title: Sweet Roasty Yam Pancakes
description: A delicious and fluffy pancake made with roasted sweet yams, perfect for a warm breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Pierce the yam with a fork several times and roast for 45-60 minutes, or until tender.
Let the yam cool, then mash.
In a large bowl, whisk together the pancake mix, granulated sweet, and melted fondue.
Add the mashed yam to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown.
